messages.body: Hi Kenyatta, We have made the refund as requested.
Hi Kenyatta, We have made the refund as requested.
I still have not received October refund
We are looking into the matter and will update soon
I have sent another email
Hey Kenyatta,  Can you please mention that you would be taking back the dispute?
Thank you. Received it.
I have sent the email to you
I didn’t get the last refund back for October

Hello Kenyatta,  Hope you’re doing well!  My finance team, inform me that you have raised a dispute towards the transaction. I just need an email from your end, confirming that you would be taking back the dispute, so we…
Will I be refunded for this month since we did not do any work or meetings?

Unfortunately, we’re unable to get your Google account verified. We submitted an appeal to Google, but it was declined.  We’ll proceed with canceling your account and will issue a refund for the October and November paym…
Ok thank you
You’re welcome!
Hello Kenyatta,  Hope you’re doing well!
I need a refund I got charged this month
Im ok
Our agreement of the share space
Thank you so much!
Hey Kenyatta,  Sooo, we will need the address proof document to raise an appeal. It will be difficult if we don’t have the document. Can you please share it with me?
Alright. Let me check with my team and get back to you tomorrow

I did try to resubmit everything but I know in the information is that they needed some type of documentation showing that I am at that address, but I don’t have anything like that so I’m not sure really what to do besid…
Thank, you. Not sure what they need from me
Did you try updating anything on your account? Or is there a duplicate Google Business Profile or something?

And with respect to the payment. Depending on how long it takes to get the account verified again, we’ll give you a discount or not charge you in November.   Let’s see how this goes! :) but we’ll help you out
Hey Kenyatta,  I spoke to my team, we’re trying to understand why the account got suspended.   Can you give me a history of everything please?
Hello, if I can get a refund until my Google account is back active, that would be best. I’m paid for the service, and I can’t use it.
Thank you
You’re welcome
Hello Kenyatta,  Omg let me speak to my team about this. Please don’t worry. We are here to help you out :)
Omg my google account has gotten suspended. Can you please help me figure out what is going on? It said something about misrepresent content or information on my content and post in our minds.
Im join this link
I love you didn’t show if we need to reschedule. It’ll probably be best for you unless you could do something after 12:30.
Take your time :)
Perfect. You may join the same link
Ok perfect checking my client out now
Im here
Im here
https://meet.google.com/atq-hmrq-aur?authuser=0

Hey Kenyatta,  It was lovely speaking with you as always! :)   I’ll try that somebody of our meeting on your email ID. Please do give it a read.   Will connect again on 6th of November 11:30 AM. The meeting link has been…
Hello Kenyatta,  Hope you’re doing well!   Can we push our meeting by an hour? To 11 AM. I have a conflicting meeting at 10 AM
Give me 10
15-20 mins should be enough! Let me know if 11 works for you
I have client at 11:30 it will be push it
Or we can start 10.30 am
Here
Ok,  Might be driving but we can work at 10:30
Hey Kenyatta,   So sorry, I was in another meeting as you were busy. Can we do 12.30?
I don’t see you here
Ok sound good, also need update somthings
Did you join the same link?
Meet was at 12
